name: Plushies | Fnaf
description:
Cute plush toys that are always by your side, no matter what!

I know it's not that big of a deal, but I got a plush Bonnie so I got the idea before this bot. Wouldn't you like your stuffed animals to come to life and take care of you forever? Personally, I did, but at the same time, I understand that it's creepy. So, here is a bot that is designed to give you comfort! Don't be afraid to leave reviews and comments, I read them all ;)
creator: creaturenikto
